installConfigs.instructions: Replace <your-certifier-api-key> with a Certifier API key from https://certifier.io/. The token is sent as 'Authorization: Bearer <token>'. Provides certificate creation, recipient management, and credential issuance tooling.

Replace <your-certifier-api-key> with a Certifier API key from https://certifier.io/. The token is sent as 'Authorization: Bearer <token>'. Provides certificate creation, recipient management, and credential issuance tooling.
